items.claim: Aliev has a grappling threat that sets up his flurries and striking.
items.quote: It's basically the grappling threat sets it up and it sets up his flurries.

items.claim: Aliev has good pressure once on top and effectively smothers opponents.
items.quote: Once he gets on top, his pressure is pretty darn good and he smothers you.

items.claim: Mike Davis should win if the fight stays on the feet.
items.quote: If this fight stays on the feet, Davis should absolutely win this fight

items.claim: Brenton Hibero has a record of two wins and three losses.
items.quote: Brenton Hibero is the guy that they seem to give for debuts because well, he's two and three.

items.claim: Magomed Tuqayev has an undefeated record of 6 and 0.
items.quote: Tuqayev, 6 and 0, 5 and 0 in the last five.

items.claim: Magomed Tuqayev sometimes drops his hands and leads with his head during blitzes.
items.quote: sometimes he does these blitzes where his hands are down here and he'll lead with the head and start throwing.

items.claim: Axel Solla has good durability, demonstrated by taking punches without caring about his safety against Jones.
items.quote: Showed his durability, but you can only do so many of those in a career.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim has broken multiple times in the UFC.
items.quote: we've seen Bom Team break multiple times in the UFC already.

items.claim: Thomas Peterson has good dirty boxing as his best weapon on the feet.
items.quote: His dirty boxing is good. I do like the dirty boxing. What I don't like is mostly the rest of it.

items.claim: Valter Walker has bad striking defense and poor-looking punches.
items.quote: Striking defense is bad. His punches don't look good.
